message:
Remove dead SQLite-only bd repair command

The repair command opens SQLite directly, bypassing the Dolt backend.
Since the SQLite backend was removed in the Dolt-native cleanup, this
entire command (~650 lines) and its tests (~200 lines) are dead code.

- Delete cmd/bd/repair.go (SQLite repair command)
- Delete cmd/bd/repair_orphans_test.go (SQLite repair tests)
- Remove "repair" from noDbCommands in main.go

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
